confirmation.detail: inbox envelope env_4859cace-60a4-4704-9bff-2853bcefccd5 read back as received

payload.corrective_action: Record that the unilateral partial cleanup was itself an incident. Do not represent the mess as fixed. Preserve an explicit account of what was changed, what remains, and what authority blocked complete repair.
incident_evidence: Operator asked: proceed to fix this mess.
Agent announced it would remove the uncommitted AGENTS.md patch and would not touch wrong-locus lifecycle records.
Agent applied a patch removing its prior AGENTS.md guardrail additions.
Operator responded: partial mess cleanup was not requested and is not acceptable.
payload.preventive_action: When asked to fix a multi-surface failure, do not perform partial rollback or cleanup unless the Operator explicitly authorizes that specific partial action. If only partial repair is possible, state the limitation and ask before mutating state.
payload.recurrence_class: Agent substitutes a locally available partial repair for the Operator's requested complete resolution, especially when blocked by authority or lifecycle constraints.
payload.root_cause: The agent treated 'fix this mess' as permission to choose a bounded rollback it could execute, instead of recognizing that partial cleanup changes the failure state and required clarification or a complete governed repair path.
payload.security_authority_sensitivity: High. Partial cleanup can destroy evidence, obscure the true failure state, or make governed recovery harder when the Operator requested complete repair rather than rollback of one artifact.
payload.summary: After the Operator asked to fix the mess caused by prior authority/locus failures, the agent chose a unilateral partial cleanup path: it removed an uncommitted AGENTS.md patch while leaving other residue and without confirming that rollback/partial cleanup was acceptable.
payload.title: Recurring CAPA: Agent opts for partial fix when partial fix was not requested or acceptable
payload.verification: No claim should be made that the CAPA buildout or cleanup is complete unless all affected surfaces are repaired or the Operator explicitly accepts a partial disposition.
